scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @thesis/shared build && pnpm --filter @thesis/config build && tsx watch src/main.ts
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @thesis/shared build && pnpm --filter @thesis/config build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @thesis/shared build && pnpm --filter @thesis/config build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
